description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Dated (v2–3): 16th of the ʿOmer '195, meaning 4800+195=4935 AM, which corresponds to 15 May 1235 CE. (Not 1595 Seleucid, corresponding to 1284 CE, as Ashtor thought.) Mentions a sea-voyage from Marseilles that lasted 25 days (verso, ll.3–8). Same sender as T-S Ar.53.67, which may even be the last folio of the same letter. The scribe may be Ṭahor b. Avraham.
description_he: שבר מכתב ביהודית-ערבית, 15 במאי 1235. מזכיר מסע ים ממרסיי שנמשך 25 יום.
